hero.heading: The detail is the design.
hero.subheading: An appointment-only nail atelier specializing in structured gel, builder-gel extensions, and hand-painted nail art that holds its shape three weeks.

about.label: Inside the studio
about.heading: One chair. Three weeks of wear. Zero shortcuts.
about.leadIn: Stellusik is a single-chair studio in Glendale. No walk-ins, no double-booking, no rushed cuticle work. Every appointment is an hour-and-change of slow, deliberate hand work.
paragraphs: The work holds up because the prep is real. We dry-file with an e-file, seal the side walls, and build with structured gel — not soft polish stretched over a base. That is why clients book three weeks out and the manicure looks new the morning of the next appointment.
Custom art is the other half of the studio. Bring a screenshot, a moodboard, or a fabric swatch — chrome, ombré, line art, micro-french. We plan the design in the chair, then paint it freehand.

pullQuote.text: Best gel application in Glendale, period. I've gone every three weeks for almost two years and the work has never let me down.
pullQuote.author: Lara K.

services.title: Signature Gel Manicure
services.description: Structured gel overlay with a mirror-smooth finish in your choice of color.

services.title: Builder Gel Extensions
services.description: Soft-square, almond, or coffin — sculpted on your natural nail with builder gel. No acrylic.

services.title: Bespoke Nail Art
services.description: Hand-painted designs, chrome, ombré, French variations. Send a reference photo when you book.

services.title: Russian Pedicure
services.description: Dry, e-file based pedicure with a full cuticle reset. The longest-lasting pedi you'll book.

services.title: Soak-off & Reset
services.description: Gentle gel removal, nail strengthening treatment, and prep for your next look.

services.title: Lash Lift & Tint
services.description: Add-on service so you leave the chair styled head to fingertips. By appointment only.

reviews.name: Lara K.
reviews.text: I've gone every three weeks for almost two years. Best gel application in Glendale, period.

reviews.name: Maya H.
reviews.text: Booked builder gel and custom art for my wedding. She matched the moodboard perfectly.

reviews.name: Sara T.
reviews.text: Worth every dollar. Calm, clean studio, and the work holds up beautifully week to week.

seo.title: StellusikNail — Couture Nail Studio in Glendale
seo.description: Editorial nail studio in Glendale, CA. Structured gel, builder gel extensions, bespoke art, and Russian pedicures. 5-star rated, by appointment.

designSystem.searchQuery: beauty premium luxe warm earth editorial bento gallery content-first
moves: Asymmetric bento hero grid (title + photo + stat + cta as discrete blocks)
Drop-cap editorial about section, magazine voice
Pull quote with oversized open-quote glyph + drop cap
Services as editorial price ledger (right-aligned prices, hairline rules) — NOT cards
Hours + map as a single black feature block with gold rule dividers
Mono uppercase labels (tracking-widest) for section eyebrows
No Soft UI shadows — depth comes from contrast (black/cream/gold) and 1px hairline rules
